title: Decadent Indian Potato Toast
description: A rich and satisfying twist on traditional toast, featuring the flavors of India and the comfort of potatoes.
instructions: Slice the potatoes into 1/2-inch thick rounds.
Arrange the potato slices in a single layer on a baking sheet.
Drizzle the potatoes with 1 tablespoon of unsalted butter, and sprinkle with 1 tablespoon of Crunchy Indian Spice Blend.
Bake the potatoes in the preheated oven for 15-20 minutes, or until crispy.
Meanwhile, toast the bread slices until lightly browned.
Spread a layer of sour cream on each toasted bread slice.
Top each bread slice with a few potato slices.
Drizzle the remaining 1 tablespoon of unsalted butter over the potatoes.
Sprinkle with the remaining 1 tablespoon of Crunchy Indian Spice Blend.
